---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a small, maintainable improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or maintenance problem would this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Alternatives Considered

What else did you try or consider?

## Safety And Scope

- [ ] This does not require automatic patch application to original files.
- [ ] This does not make model predictions authoritative over deterministic
      checks, tests, trials, or benchmark evidence.
- [ ] This does not require committing generated/raw data or model artifacts.
- [ ] This does not require LLM fine-tuning or external API calls.
